title: Prepositiones
summary: In, on, under, between — locating things precisely.

teach.target: Le catto es sub le tabula.
teach.roman: le catto es sub le tabula
teach.english: The cat is under the table.
teach.ipa: le kˈato es sˈub le tˈabula

teach.target: Le libro es sur le tabula, inter le lampa e le taza.
teach.roman: le libro es sur le tabula inter le lampa e le taza
teach.english: The book is on the table, between the lamp and the cup.
teach.ipa: le lˈibro es sˈur le tˈabula ˈinter le lˈampa e le tˈaza

grammar.title: Locating things precisely
grammar.body:
**sur** = on/on top of, **sub** = under, **inter** = between/among, **ante** = in front of/before, **detra** = behind, **presso** = near.
These combine cleanly with **al** (a + le) and **del** (de + le): **le can es presso del porta** (the dog is near the door).

teach.target: Le schola es ante le parco e detra le urbe vetule.
teach.roman: le schola es ante le parco e detra le urbe vetule
teach.english: The school is in front of the park and behind the old city.
teach.ipa: le stʃˈola es ˈante le pˈarko e dˈetra le ˈurbe vˈetule

reading.title: Un die in le montania
passage: Anna e Marco ha vadite al montania con lor amico.
Illes ha ascendite le montania e ha vidite un fluvio inter le arbores.
Le sol esseva calide, ma un vento frigide veniva del mar.
Sur un petra presso del fluvio, illes ha comenciate a mangiar.
"Esserea agradabile vader ci cata septimana," ha dicite Anna.
Marco ha respondite: "Si, ma le proxime vice, io vole trovar le mar!"

questions.prompt: Where did Anna and Marco go?
What did they see between the trees?

choices: On a rock near the river

questions.prompt: What does Marco want to find next time?
